steps.title: Write the circle form
steps.content:
A circle with center $(h,k)$ has equation
$$
(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2
$$
With center $(-5,1)$, the left side is
$$
(x+5)^2+(y-1)^2
$$

steps.title: Build the equation
steps.content: Substitute the center and radius value. $$ (x+5)^2+(y-1)^2=25 $$ The answer is D.
